title: Sant Antoni Orange and Date Market and Fair (Ciutadella)
location: Centro de Ciutadella; mercado de naranjas y dátiles en la plaza de Sant Antoni
description: For Sant Antoni, Ciutadella holds its food and craft fair and the distinctive orange-and-date market, a winter tradition that fills the town centre with produce, sweets and craft stalls. Market on 17 January; the full fair programme is to be confirmed with the Ajuntament de Ciutadella.
